name: Tangy Lime Tuna Salad
directions: drain the oil from the tuna.
place the tuna into a bowl and with the help of a fork flake it.
in another bowl mix together, mayonnaise, salt, pepper, sugar, sauce and lemon juice.
add in the parsley and corriander and finally the onion and the fish.
just before serving, in a bowl mix together the lettuce, lemon juice, salt and sugar.
place these leaves on the serving plate.
on these put the salad and give it the shape of a fish.
other than being served as a salad, it can also be used as a sandwich spread.

similar.name: Big Poppas Eat Mo' Tuna Salad

name: Tuna Balls
directions: Mix all ingredients except the potato chips.
Roll into small balls and chill.
When chilled roll balls in crushed potato chips and refrigerate.

similar.name: Big Poppas Eat Mo' Tuna Salad

name: Mom's Favorite Tuna Dip
directions: Combine all the ingredients and mix well.
Chill for at least 2 hours to allow time for the flavors to blend.
Serve with Bugles, or other toasted corn type dipper.

similar.name: Big Poppas Eat Mo' Tuna Salad

name: My Favorite Tuna Salad
ingredients: solid white tuna packed in water
directions: Mix mayo, mustard, relish& lemon juice in lge bowl.
Add tuna, break up and blend.
Add onions, celery, and spices to taste.
Serve on sandwiches with tomato slices and lettuce.

name: Big Poppas Eat Mo' Tuna Salad
directions: THIS IS IDIOT PROOF.
YOU STICK IT ALL IN A BOWL STIR IT UP AND ADD MORE MIRACLE WHIP OF ITS NOT TO YOUR LIKING.
SERVE ON ICEBERG LEAVES GARNISH WITH THE CILANTRO AND SERVE WITH WHEAT CRACKERS AND MONTERREY JACK CHEESE OR GARLIC BAGEL CHIPS TAMBIEN.
WHATEVER YOU LIKE-- LEMONADE GOES BEST WITH THIS DISH.

name: Celery Boats
directions: Mix all but the celery.
Fill celery pieces with tuna mixture.
Refrigerate until served.

similar.name: Big Poppas Eat Mo' Tuna Salad

name: Mexican Tuna Dip
directions: Squeeze water out of the tuna.
Place all ingredients in a food processor and puree.

If you like your dip a little thinner, then add more salsa. If you like it a little spicier, add some hot sauce. If you want it thicker, add a little more mayonnaise. I've tried it all -- this recipe is very easy to adjust and it's delicious!
Serve with a good quality restaurant style tortilla chips.

similar.name: Big Poppas Eat Mo' Tuna Salad
